_comment: The npm identity wasm-pack cannot know (DEC-067). `pkg/` is regenerated from scratch
by every `just wasm-build`, so nothing there can be hand-edited and survive — these
fields are merged into pkg/package.json by scripts/wasm-npm-finalize.mjs, which the
`just wasm-npm-pkg` recipe runs. `_comment` is stripped on merge.
NOT overridden, on purpose: `version` (wasm-pack copies it from Cargo.toml, which is
exactly the lockstep DEC-067 wants — an override here could only introduce drift),
right, and `sideEffects` in particular is a bundler contract we have no reason to
name: crustyimg-wasm
description: Resize, convert, and optimize images in the browser — the crustyimg engine compiled to WebAssembly. No native addon, no postinstall build, no server.
